sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36038" key="e)nsa/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνσάττω</orth>, <sense id="n36038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stuff in,</tr_> of one eating sausages, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
